_comment: Evaluation agents. Haiku and Sonnet use the same Claude Code harness with different foundation models. Codex uses the Codex CLI as a different harness. The baseline is a deterministic infrastructure check and is not an AI agent result.

codex.note: Uses the Codex CLI account default model. Headless MCP currently requires --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox; the runner requires explicit --allow-unsafe-codex acknowledgement.
